items.title: Bill Ackman Takes Stake In Meta, Flags ‘Significant Upside Potential From AI’
items.description: Bill Ackman’s hedge fund Pershing Square acquired a sizable stake in Meta, amounting to 10% of its capital at the end of 2025.

items.title: Ford Reportedly Boosts Companywide Bonus On Solving Vehicle Quality Issues That Spurred 2025 Recall Streak
items.description: Reuters reported on Wednesday, citing four people familiar with the matter, that the company’s companywide bonuses would be set to 130%.
